title: Rethoughted Spawn Eggs
body:
![Visualizing changes in textures](https://i.imgur.com/G2uBPO2.png) ### 🐣 About changes: #### This resource pack replaces standard 2D textures of spawn eggs with 3D models while they held in hand in first-person and third-person view. All models are as close as possible to their 2D textures. - - - ### ⏳ Upcoming updates: - #### Custom and unique animations for eggs for [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) v5.1 - #### Variants for spawn eggs in 3D and 2D, whose mobs have multiple variants - #### Some kind of resource pack configuration via [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) - #### Mod compatibility - - - ### 🔽 Instalation:
Windows Extract files from .zip by path:
>C:\\Users\\(Your Username)\\AppData\\Roaming\\.minecraft\\resourcepacks
Linux Extract files from .zip by path:
>~/.minecraft\\resourcepacks
MacOS Extract files from .zip by path:
>~/Library/Application Support/minecraft\\resourcepacks
--- ### 📄 Credits: #### Textures and models created by CatFromNet (me) #### Inspired by [Actions & Stuff](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.5.1/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) addon --- ### 📜 License & Distribution #### By downloading or using this resource pack, you agree to the terms of the CC BY-NC 4.0 license.
You are allowed to: - download, use and share this resource pack - include it on your server or in your modpack - modify the files for non-commercial purposes - publish modified versions with proper credit to the original author
You are not allowed to: - sell or monetize the original files in any form - upload paywalled downloads or ad-locked links using the original pack - claim authorship of the original textures or models - use this resource pack, or any unmodified part of it, for commercial projects
#### Commercial use of modified versions is also not permitted unless you have received explicit permission from the author. --- ### 🔎You may also like:
